Improve resume by rewriting it in a professional tone.  
Office Assistant & Bookkeeper  
Mallott’s General Store  

• Track and record deposited checks and sale transaction revenue using the POS system and business financial banking account.  
• Provide monthly billing invoices for customer personal expenses.  
• Handle cash personal/business checks, facilitate money transfers such as MoneyGram.  
• Calculate and document payroll taxes, wages, and prepare financial reports using Quickbooks and 21st Century Accounting.  
• Receive and respond to calls from customers requiring assistance with business-related inquiries and issues.
